headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Lockheed Martin (LMT) After Orion’s Artemis II Deep-Space Test Launch
summary: NASA’s Orion spacecraft, built by Lockheed Martin, was launched on April 1, 2026, aboard the Space Launch System rocket for the 10‑day Artemis II crewed mission around the Moon, testing life-support, safety and communication systems in deep space. This successful launch highlights Lockheed Martin’s key role in both crewed lunar exploration and advanced space technology, while its parallel investments in missile production capacity and rapid prototyping facilities underscore how the company...
